name: deepmerge
usage_summary: Single call site in packages/cli-kit/src/public/common/object.ts. The exported `deepMergeObjects` wrapper calls `deepMerge(lhs, rhs, {arrayMerge})` — a thin one-liner wrapper around the library's default export. No subpath imports.
how_to_remove: Replace the single `deepMerge(lhs, rhs, {arrayMerge})` call in object.ts with a small inline recursive merge function (~15 lines) or with structuredClone + a custom array-merge strategy. The surrounding `deepMergeObjects` signature stays unchanged, so no callers need updating.
replacement_reason: deepmerge has had zero releases since October 2022 (last version 4.3.1). The single usage is a trivial one-liner that is easily inlined. Removing it reduces supply-chain risk from an unmaintained package.
